headline: EMCOR GROUP INC (NYSE:EME) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Stellar Fundamentals
summary: The Caviar Cruise stock screen identifies quality companies like EMCOR Group, which shows exceptional profitability, 97.5% ROIC, minimal debt, and strong cash flow for long-term compounding.
